creator: churanov.port.maintainer@gmail.com
text:
This is the update for devel/boost-* ports from maintainer. The patch updates Boost ports and fixes dependent applications as well.

The patch is based on ports snapshotted at March 2, 2011. There is a chance some parts of the patch will not apply cleanly due to possible changes happened since that date. An exp-run is required.

The applications were only built on x86-32.

Fix: 

http://alexanderchuranov.com/boost-port/boost-1.45-to-1.46.1_attempt05.diff
